text: Horrible. I really loved original version where Kurt Russell and Goldie Hawn had perfect chemistry. But this new version casting is terrible. I like Anna Faris but who the heck is that guy?? Why Hollywood? Why MGM? Why do you want ruin the original classic?
author: @venkman623

text: While it does look good, why does everything nowadays have to be a remake? Especially with such a big Latino cast? Eugenio Derbez is a comedy genious, can't he come up with something better? And the original was amazing, so tired of seeing remakes at the movies over and over again. It's almost like the only thing Hollywood can come up with are either action hero movies or remakes.
author: @yanethmaldonado9151
